rust-brain.description: Rust code intelligence MCP server - provides semantic search, call graph traversal, trait resolution, and code analysis tools

tools.name: search_semantic
tools.description: Search for Rust code using natural language queries. Returns matching functions, structs, enums, traits with relevance scores.

query.description: Natural language search query describing what code you're looking for

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

tools.name: get_function
tools.description: Get full details for a specific function by its fully qualified name, including source code, parameters, return type, and callers.

fqn.description: Fully qualified name of the function (e.g., 'serde_json::from_str')

tools.name: get_callers
tools.description: Find all functions that call the specified function, including transitive callers up to a specified depth.

fqn.description: Fully qualified name of the callee function

depth.description: Call depth to traverse (1=direct callers only, 2=callers of callers, etc.)

tools.name: get_trait_impls
tools.description: List all implementations of a specific trait in the codebase.

trait_name.description: Fully qualified name of the trait (e.g., 'serde::Serialize')

include_methods.description: Include implemented methods in the response

tools.name: find_usages_of_type
tools.description: Find all locations where a specific type is used in the codebase.

type_name.description: Fully qualified name of the type

usage_type.description: Filter by how the type is used

tools.name: get_module_tree
tools.description: Get the module hierarchy for a crate, showing nested modules and their items.

include_items.description: Include items (functions, structs, etc.) in each module

tools.name: query_graph
tools.description: Execute raw Cypher queries against the Neo4j graph database. Use for advanced queries not covered by other tools.
